description: AN11 (a) weight_emergent — deterministic verifier. Confirms that post-training ckpt exhibits a real weight delta vs base ckpt (Frobenius norm > threshold), has an actual LoRA adapter rank > 0, and a stable SHA256 fingerprint distinct from base.
principles: LLM judge banned. Only Frobenius (L2 over concatenated float tensors or byte payload) + SHA256 + file-size measurements.

backends.native_bytes: od/xxd byte-stream L2 (fallback, no parse deps)

output_schema.adapter_rank: int — LoRA rank (0 if adapter absent)

exit_code.0: PASS — delta > threshold AND adapter_rank >= min_rank AND fingerprint != base
exit_code.1: FAIL — one or more gates failed (reason populated)
exit_code.2: INPUT_ERR — missing ckpts and no synthetic fallback enabled
exit_code.3: DRY_RUN — synthetic tensors consumed (for smoke wiring only)

comment.min_delta_threshold: 1e-3 Frobenius over concatenated LoRA adapter tensors. Below this, adapter is essentially untrained noise (identity-ish). Tune per round in manifest override if needed.
comment.min_adapter_rank: rank 0 means no LoRA layers exist — disqualifies weight_emergent claim regardless of delta.
comment.min_fingerprint_diff_bytes: if sha256(round_N) == sha256(base), files are literally identical — weight_emergent is vacuously false.
